name: spotiarr
description: Self-hosted Spotify downloader with media server integration and *ARR compatibility
author: Alexander Saavedra <mralexsaavedra@gmail.com>

scripts.build: pnpm run build:be && pnpm run build:fe
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter backend lint && pnpm --filter frontend lint
scripts.test: pnpm --filter backend test && pnpm --filter frontend test
